steps.title: Identify the clause structures
steps.content: The vessel took six days to dislodge is an independent clause. It is as heavy as two thousand blue whales when fully loaded is an independent clause that follows.

steps.title: Apply the colon rule
steps.content:
A colon can connect independent clauses when the second elaborates on or explains the first—choice B correctly applies this rule.

Choices A and C violate the rule by using commas (creating comma splices), and choice D violates it by using no punctuation.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
